permissionSummary.impact: namespace labels and environment/data-plane inference may be unavailable
sidecar detection from running pods may be unavailable
service inventory, workload ports, policy targetRefs, and multi-cluster gateway signals may be unavailable
DaemonSet workload posture may be unavailable
deployment workload posture may be unavailable
standalone ReplicaSet workload posture may be unavailable
StatefulSet workload posture may be unavailable
selectorless Service attachment and workload port evidence may be unavailable
ambient L7 waypoint enforceability may be unavailable without Gateway evidence; denied scope(s): namespace/omg-port-override
client TLS contradiction posture resolves to unknown without DestinationRule evidence
DestinationRule visibility may be unavailable without Sidecar egress scoping evidence
effective authorization posture resolves to unknown without AuthorizationPolicy evidence
effective mTLS posture resolves to unknown without PeerAuthentication evidence

chain.effect: defaults mesh mTLS mode to PERMISSIVE when no PeerAuthentication mode overrides it

chain.name: default
chain.effect: sets mesh-wide mTLS mode to STRICT

chain.name: default
chain.effect: sets namespace mTLS mode to STRICT

chain.name: port-override
chain.effect: sets workload mTLS mode to STRICT

chain.name: port-override
chain.effect: sets port 8080 mTLS mode to DISABLE
establishes Istio's implicit allow when no applicable ALLOW policy exists

chain.name: authz-root-default-deny
chain.effect: selector does not match the workload; excludes policy from authorization evaluation

findings.title: Mesh-managed workloads must have resolved authorization coverage

resolutionChain.effect: establishes Istio's implicit allow when no applicable ALLOW policy exists

resolutionChain.name: authz-root-default-deny
resolutionChain.effect: selector does not match the workload; excludes policy from authorization evaluation

findings.reasoning: omg-port-override/port-api has no resolved AuthorizationPolicy coverage.

remediation.guidance: Apply an AuthorizationPolicy that selects this workload and inspect the resolution chain to confirm its effective scope.

findings.title: Workloads should resolve to default deny with explicit allow

resolutionChain.effect: establishes Istio's implicit allow when no applicable ALLOW policy exists

resolutionChain.name: authz-root-default-deny
resolutionChain.effect: selector does not match the workload; excludes policy from authorization evaluation

findings.reasoning: Authorization for omg-port-override/port-api resolves to no-policy, not default deny with explicit allow.

remediation.guidance: Establish an empty ALLOW policy for default deny and add narrowly scoped ALLOW rules for required traffic.

findings.title: Authorization access must be scoped to explicit identities

resolutionChain.effect: establishes Istio's implicit allow when no applicable ALLOW policy exists

resolutionChain.name: authz-root-default-deny
resolutionChain.effect: selector does not match the workload; excludes policy from authorization evaluation

findings.reasoning: Authorization access for omg-port-override/port-api is not scoped to explicit principals, namespaces, or workloads.

remediation.guidance: Scope ALLOW rules to approved principals, namespaces, service accounts, or workload identities.

findings.title: Authorization coverage must resolve at workload level

resolutionChain.effect: establishes Istio's implicit allow when no applicable ALLOW policy exists

resolutionChain.name: authz-root-default-deny
resolutionChain.effect: selector does not match the workload; excludes policy from authorization evaluation

findings.reasoning: omg-port-override/port-api is not selected by any resolved AuthorizationPolicy.

remediation.guidance: Correct policy namespace, selector, or targetRefs so coverage reaches this workload rather than relying on policy resource presence alone.

findings.title: Mesh-managed workloads must resolve to strict mTLS

resolutionChain.effect: defaults mesh mTLS mode to PERMISSIVE when no PeerAuthentication mode overrides it

resolutionChain.name: default
resolutionChain.effect: sets mesh-wide mTLS mode to STRICT

resolutionChain.name: default
resolutionChain.effect: sets namespace mTLS mode to STRICT

resolutionChain.name: port-override
resolutionChain.effect: sets workload mTLS mode to STRICT

resolutionChain.name: port-override
resolutionChain.effect: sets port 8080 mTLS mode to DISABLE

findings.reasoning: Effective mTLS for omg-port-override/port-api resolves to disabled, not strict.

remediation.guidance: Apply or correct PeerAuthentication so the workload resolves to STRICT, then inspect the attached resolution chain.
remediation.suggestedYAML:
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: omg-port-override
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT

findings.title: Declared workload ports must resolve to strict mTLS

resolutionChain.effect: defaults mesh mTLS mode to PERMISSIVE when no PeerAuthentication mode overrides it

resolutionChain.name: default
resolutionChain.effect: sets mesh-wide mTLS mode to STRICT

resolutionChain.name: default
resolutionChain.effect: sets namespace mTLS mode to STRICT

resolutionChain.name: port-override
resolutionChain.effect: sets workload mTLS mode to STRICT

resolutionChain.name: port-override
resolutionChain.effect: sets port 8080 mTLS mode to DISABLE

findings.reasoning: Effective mTLS for omg-port-override/port-api permits plaintext on one or more declared workload ports.

remediation.guidance: Correct workload-level port mTLS overrides so every declared, Service-bound workload port resolves to STRICT.

findings.title: Workloads must never resolve to globally disabled mTLS

resolutionChain.effect: defaults mesh mTLS mode to PERMISSIVE when no PeerAuthentication mode overrides it

resolutionChain.name: default
resolutionChain.effect: sets mesh-wide mTLS mode to STRICT

resolutionChain.name: default
resolutionChain.effect: sets namespace mTLS mode to STRICT

resolutionChain.name: port-override
resolutionChain.effect: sets workload mTLS mode to STRICT

resolutionChain.name: port-override
resolutionChain.effect: sets port 8080 mTLS mode to DISABLE

findings.reasoning: Effective mTLS for omg-port-override/port-api is disabled.

remediation.guidance: Apply or correct PeerAuthentication so the workload no longer resolves to DISABLE, then inspect the attached resolution chain.
